decks.notes: The deck focuses on playing aggressively with Eldrazi creatures and disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Chalice of the Void and Wasteland. It aims to ramp into powerful threats like Thought-Knot Seer and It That Heralds the End quickly, using cards like Eldrazi Temple and Ancient Tomb to accelerate its mana production. The inclusion of cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide allows for explosive plays early in the game, putting pressure on the opponent and closing out games quickly.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using Cloudpost and Urza's lands to play powerful ramp spells like Crop Rotation and Stock Up. The goal is to quickly assemble the Urza lands to generate massive amounts of mana to play game-ending threats like Planar Nexus and Karn, the Great Creator. The deck also includes powerful control elements like Trinisphere and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The key strategy is to outpace the opponent's mana development and overwhelm them with powerful threats and disruptive spells.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently mill cards into the graveyard to power out Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis as early as possible. The deck utilizes cards like Stitcher's Supplier, Once Upon a Time, and Wight of the Reliquary to fill the graveyard while also having access to cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push for disruption. The deck also includes key lands like Wasteland and Bojuka Bog to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to combo off and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful creature like Hogaak.

This deck focuses on utilizing a mix of aggressive Human creatures and disruptive spells to control the board and push through damage quickly. Cards like Champion of the Parish and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben help to pump up the team and slow down opponents, while cards like Force of Will and Lavinia, Azorius Renegade disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes utility lands like Wasteland and Karakas to keep opponents on their toes. By combining aggression with disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure a fast victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like White Orchid Phantom and Clarion Conqueror to apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Containment Priest. The deck also includes synergies with equipment like Batterskull and Meteor Sword to further enhance its creatures. The inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion provides additional value through blinking creatures and disrupting opponents' strategies. Overall, this deck aims to create a proactive game plan while disrupting opponents' strategies to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize Mystic Forge in combination with various artifacts to generate a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By using cards like Voltaic Key, Manifold Key, and Glaring Fleshraker, this deck aims to create a dominant board presence and take advantage of powerful artifacts like The One Ring and Planar Nexus. With support from cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms, this deck can quickly establish control and outpace opponents in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The key concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's resources through discard spells like Thoughtseize and board wipes like Smallpox while utilizing resource denial cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter. The deck aims to control the game by creating a resource advantage with cards like Life from the Loam and Urza's Saga. Additionally, the deck utilizes a graveyard strategy with cards like Grist, the Hunger Tide and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis to generate threats and grind out the opponent. It also has a toolbox aspect with cards like Pithing Needle and Nihil Spellbomb to deal with specific threats.

This Legacy 1 vs 1 combo deck focuses on utilizing cards like Ad Nauseam, Infernal Tutor, and Tendrils of Agony to generate a lethal Storm count. The deck also includes cards like Wishclaw Talisman and Burning Wish for additional searching and flexibility. With powerful mana acceleration from cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to quickly assemble the necessary pieces for a game-winning Storm combo. Side note: The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble adds some additional utility and card advantage to the deck.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy by utilizing powerful creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls, along with disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy to control the game. The deck also includes Ajani, Nacatl Pariah as a finisher to further push for victory. The mana base is carefully constructed with lands like Karakas, Badlands, and Wasteland to ensure consistency and flexibility in casting spells. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a quick win.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize Cloudpost Ramp to quickly generate mana and play powerful Eldrazi creatures, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere. The deck focuses on speeding up the mana curve to play high-cost spells like Ulamog and Karn, with additional protection from All Is Dust. The inclusion of Planar Nexus allows for extra turns to continue ramping and overwhelming the opponent with large threats. The deck's ultimate goal is to overpower the opponent through efficient mana generation and powerful creatures.

The main focus of this UWx Control deck is to establish control over the game by utilizing a variety of countermagic, removal, and card advantage engines. By efficiently managing threats through cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares, while also generating card advantage with Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents. The inclusion of cards like Thundertrap Trainer and Murktide Regent provide additional threats to close out the game, making it a well-rounded and adaptable control deck in the Legacy format.

This deck focuses on utilizing Cradle mana to ramp up and control the board with versatile creatures and spells. The key strategy is to quickly build up mana with cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Gaea's Cradle, while disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Wasteland and Collector Ouphe. Once you have established board control, you can close out the game with powerful threats like Wight of the Reliquary and Craterhoof Behemoth. The deck also includes some graveyard hate and toolbox creatures for added flexibility in different matchups.

This deck focuses on controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf. The deck utilizes a mix of countermagic like Force of Will and disruption spells like Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also utilizing removal spells like Fatal Push to deal with threats. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and helps filter through the deck. Overall, the deck aims to maintain tempo through efficient plays and disruptive elements to gain an advantage and secure a win.

The deck focuses on aggressive play style with a mix of creatures, disruption spells, and card advantage engines to maintain tempo and control the game. It aims to disrupt opponent's game plan using hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and counter spells like Force of Will, while also applying pressure with efficient creatures like Nethergoyf and Murktide Regent. The deck's mana base is optimized for consistency and flexibility, allowing it to quickly deploy threats and answer opposing threats effectively. Overall, it excels at applying pressure while disrupting opponent's strategy to come out ahead in the game.

This deck focuses on disruption and aggressive tempo plays. The primary goal is to utilize cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, Daze, and Force of Will to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent provide additional threats while keeping up the tempo. The deck's mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors. Overall, the strategy revolves around maintaining pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish control of the game by putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Murktide Regent. The deck also includes a mix of disruptive spells like Daze, Force of Will, and Lightning Bolt to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to consistently apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategies, ultimately leading to a quick victory through efficient and powerful plays.
